trans-unit.source: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Email/password sign-in is not implemented yet. Use "Continue with Google".
Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
Password can not be reset, Please try the Google sign-in option.
We are not accepting new users at the moment. Please try again later.
Tell me about your project or inquiry...
I typically respond within 24 business hours.
Built scalable Angular application with reusable components, interactive dashboards, and data visualizations using charts (E-Charts, Cytoscape) and modern UI patterns.
Used SSR, Redux state management, lazy loading, and performance profiling.
Implemented RAG workflows utilizing LLMs for scalable, low-latency information retrieval.
Integrated hybrid search combining dense and sparse embeddings with Neo4j graph traversal.
Built and maintained portfolio manager dashboards using Angular 17 and Node JS BFF.
Ensured seamless migration from Polymer 1 to 3, implemented unit tests with Jest.
Developed BFF for consuming FIXatdl files and structured it for frontend.
Created Angular components for the UI library of Murex with Documentation.
Wrote UI component Unit Tests ensuring high code coverage.
Responsible for creation of website designs and prototypes using XD and FIGMA.
Developed frontend using Angular 8, Material Design, and Bootstrap.
Built an intelligent web dashboard for supply chain management.
Worked with REST APIs, Angular 7, and TypeScript.
Developed relational database on MS Server and designed schemas.
Used MS-Business Intelligence tools for reporting.
Created backend services according to client needs.
I design scalable frontend systems with performance and clarity in mind.
Engineering systems that scale beyond the interface.
With 6+ years building production systems, I specialize in frontend architecture, distributed system design, and integrating AI pipelines into user-facing products.
I've led micro-frontend migrations serving 2M+ users, optimized Core Web Vitals across enterprise applications, and designed real-time data pipelines for ML-powered features.
My approach is systems-first: every component, every abstraction, every API boundary is designed for resilience, observability, and team velocity
Systems-first thinking with composable, testable abstractions
Designed platforms serving millions with sub-second latency
Optimized Core Web Vitals across enterprise applications
From database schemas to pixel-perfect interfaces
Open to discussing architecture challenges, system design consulting, or full-time engineering roles. Let's talk.
Crafting end-to-end systems that transform complex data into real-time, intelligent user experiences — powered by Angular, AI, and scalable backend architectures
With over 5 years of experience architecting digital solutions, I specialize in building high-performance frontend interfaces, robust backend systems, and integrated AI applications.
Whether you're a startup looking for an MVP or an established enterprise seeking technical leadership, I help turn complex ideas into seamless user experiences.
